enrichment.recent_news: TechCorp just closed a $12M Series A led by Sequoia. They posted 3 SDR job listings on LinkedIn last week.
enrichment.hiring_signals: 3 SDR positions open, 1 Sales Manager position open

call_plan.hook: Congrats on the Series A — saw you're hiring 3 SDRs. Scaling outbound is probably top of mind.
call_plan.pain_hypothesis: Scaling outbound with a small team post-funding. Adding headcount is expensive and slow — they need more output from fewer reps.
call_plan.primary_objective: Book a 15-minute demo for next week
call_plan.fallback_objective: Send a relevant case study and schedule a follow-up call
objection_prep: not the right time — just closed funding

enrichment.recent_news: DataStack launched a new enterprise product tier last month. CEO quoted in TechCrunch about aggressive 2026 growth targets.

call_plan.hook: Saw the new enterprise tier launch — congrats. Sounds like you're pushing upmarket, which usually means the outbound motion needs to level up too.
call_plan.pain_hypothesis: Moving upmarket requires more sophisticated, personalized outreach. Enterprise prospects ignore generic sequences. Current SalesLoft setup is cadence-driven and not adapting.
call_plan.primary_objective: Book a 15-minute demo for next week
call_plan.fallback_objective: Get agreement to send enterprise case study and follow up

enrichment.recent_news: SwiftPay expanded into European markets Q4 2025. Published a blog post about challenges scaling international sales teams.
enrichment.hiring_signals: 4 SDR positions (2 US, 2 London), 1 Sales Ops role

call_plan.hook: Saw you're expanding into Europe — scaling outbound across multiple regions is a challenge we help a lot of teams with.
call_plan.pain_hypothesis: International expansion means new markets, new personas, new messaging — hard to personalize at scale across regions. Apollo's basic sequences won't cut it for European enterprise buyers.
call_plan.primary_objective: Book a 15-minute demo for next week
call_plan.fallback_objective: Send the PayBridge fintech case study and schedule follow-up
objection_prep: need to standardize before adding tools

enrichment.recent_news: ShieldNet announced FedRAMP authorization last month. Expanding into government and defense verticals.
enrichment.hiring_signals: 8 SDR positions, 4 AE positions, new VP Marketing role

call_plan.hook: Congrats on the FedRAMP authorization — that opens up a huge market. I imagine the outbound motion for government buyers looks pretty different from commercial.
call_plan.pain_hypothesis: Government and defense buyers require highly specific, compliant, and technical messaging. Generic SDR outreach won't work. They need AI that understands the cybersecurity + gov space to personalize at the level these buyers expect.
call_plan.primary_objective: Book a 30-minute demo including their VP Sales
call_plan.fallback_objective: Send NexGen Security case study (cybersecurity enterprise) and schedule follow-up with VP Sales
objection_prep: need to involve VP Sales and IT security

enrichment.recent_news: PixelCraft featured in a MarTech Today article about emerging design automation tools. Founder posted on LinkedIn about hitting $1M ARR.
enrichment.hiring_signals: 1 SDR position, first dedicated sales hire

call_plan.hook: Congrats on hitting $1M ARR — saw Amy's post. Hiring your first SDR is a big step. Getting them productive fast is everything.
call_plan.pain_hypothesis: First sales hire at a seed-stage startup. No outbound infrastructure yet. Using Instantly for volume but reply rates are probably low. Needs to maximize output from a single SDR.
call_plan.fallback_objective: Send the GrowthLabs case study (small MarTech company, Apollo complement) and follow up
objection_prep: just one SDR — not worth it yet
